review_title: The perfect tool for your first property
description: Smoobu was my first PMS. When I bought my first vacation rental property, I was torn between several options, but after talking to colleagues in the industry, I finally decided on Smoobu. The learning curve is easy; there are only two or three aspects that might be a little complicated, but you learn quickly. It's very intuitive, with a simple but effective control panel. I think it's the perfect tool for getting started.
author: Pedro C.
pros: It's easy and intuitive to start with. The learning curve is quick, I only got stuck in the section on setting prices and minimum nights. There have never been any duplicate bookings and the support team is good. I think it's good value for money.
cons: When you grow and have many properties, it offers fewer features than other PMSs. The connection to other software that helps with tourist property management is not as extensive as in competing PMSs. The “ANALYTICS” section could be more comprehensive. The “prices” section can be difficult to understand at first; that part could be simplified.

review_title: Mainly pleasant experience with a few Tech glitch over the years
description: we were with them for a couple of years and it help to tracked our property inventory availablity for our property service accoomdation.
author: Chrissy T.
pros: It help to intergate all my property across all platform and really save lots of time with the monitor of inventory availability
cons: There are a few time when the system fail to sync with other platform and we end up having to sort out all the double booking with lot of hassle. But generally their customer service are very fast to response and also help to resolve the issue.

review_title: SMOOBU was good 5 years ago... then became too expensive and lacked the qualities found in another Channel Manager.
description: It was a good experience for the first two years, then SMOOBU lacked improvements, updates, upgrades and became too expensive. I was very happy to discover HOSTEX, for a fraction of the price, with a great interface and many more functionalities.
author: Stephan C.
pros: Solid experience. Does the job : for a few years, it was a good solution, until the price went soaring up, with no improvements.
cons: More expensive than other Channel Manager Solutions. Lacks major elements : create multiple payment on website plugin. Calendar and price management slow.

review_title: Everything you need in a PMS
description: This is a great PMS. I haven’t had any glitches or issues with it which is one of the most important things. It does everything I need it to do. I have recommended it to many people and have used it for several clients as a booking engine on their direct rental sites.
author: Rebecca Q.
pros: I have used Smoobu for 4 years now for my 6 listings and use it as a booking engine on my own website. It works wonderfully. I love the ease of use as a user and to set up. It has many great features from the automated guest messages, guidebook, booking engine, etc. I have used for several client’s websites as well.
cons: There are a couple features I wish it had, mostly to do with pricing/discount options to offer so I could offer the same options that I do on Airbnb. I wish that you could set up discounts fo specific dates. Unfortunately any discounts set up apply to all dates. I do wish the pricing sync with VRBO had been fixed by now.

review_title: Good for small company
description: Overall a good experience. We used Smoobu, untill we started hiring Customer Service staff and they needed a centralized communication terminal that when we switched. For most entrepreneurs who runs Airbnbs it works great, in many wasy more simple than other solutions on the market. I wish they did make the SMS automation work, I wish full API integration with VRBO worked as well. But you cant get everything.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Price is the best. It does basic things like it will keep all your listings in sync. Forget about centralized messaging, because certain things just won't sync like VRBO. But for small operators 1-5 peroperties it works great, and price you can't beat
cons: no full API integration with VRBOlack of SMS automationsCustomer Service doesn't existi, you can create a ticket they will answer next week

review_title: Highly recommend Smoobu - even if you are a small operator
description: Smoobu Customer Service is Fantastic! I always get a quick response, and they never make me feel 'dumb' - because sometimes I ask some off-the-wall questions! I highly recommend Smoobu to all vacation rental owners. We only have 2 units, and we couldn't do it without them!
author: Cheryl M.
pros: What we like most about the software: ease of use, communication templates/scheduling of messages, ability to update rates and they immediately update across all connected OTAs, ability to set % increases on OTAs over our direct book rates, Digital Guest Guidebook (& how easy it is to customize regarding what guests see before, during & after their stays), & the ability to nest units. There's more to like out the software, but these are the top items on our list.
cons: Always looking for more features, but what they already have far exceeds previous channel managers I've used.

review_title: The have lost they way.....
description: My experience with Smoobu has become increasingly frustrating. What was once a solid, user-friendly platform has evolved into a system that feels disjointed and difficult to navigate. The lack of attention to customer feedback, combined with ongoing technical issues and unreliable support, makes it harder to justify continuing with the software. Unless Smoobu prioritizes stability, usability, and customer engagement over constant, untested updates, I would not recommend it for serious property managers.
author: Martin M.
pros: Smoobu was once a reliable and user-friendly property management tool for vacation rental hosts. The channel manager’s ability to sync bookings across multiple platforms like Airbnb and Booking.com was a key advantage, helping to prevent double bookings. Some of the automation features, such as message templates and guest communication, were helpful in streamlining operations.
cons: Unfortunately, Smoobu continues to fall short in several areas. Frequent product and menu changes have made it increasingly difficult to manage even simple tasks, reducing overall efficiency. Customer support has significantly deteriorated over the past five years, with little to no effort to engage with customers or address concerns effectively. Recent integrations with Airbnb and Booking.com have caused major issues, including automated guest communications no longer being delivered, leading to frustration for both hosts and guests. Additionally, there is a strong focus on launching new features that often feel rushed and inadequately tested, causing more problems than they solve.

review_title: Smoobu, low listing prices and great perks !!
description: Smoobu offers a free website builder with direct booking! This is crucial to quick and easy bookings that go directly to me.
author: Nicole E.
pros: Smoobu made listing multiple properties not be a headache anymore. I don’t have to worry about double listings now!
cons: Time Zone differences make it a little difficult to communicate so I think this could be better to have more availability.

review_title: Efficient Property Management with Easy Booking Syncing
description: Overall, my experience with Smoobu was great. It efficiently centralized booking management and communication, saving time and reducing errors. The interface was intuitive, though more customization options for reports would be helpful.
author: Bobby A.
pros: What I liked most about Smoobu was its all-in-one platform that synced calendars and messages across booking sites, saving time and avoiding double bookings. The interface was clean and easy to navigate.
cons: What I liked least about Smoobu was the limited customization options for reports and the occasional delay in syncing changes across platforms.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Dont walk, Run to Smoobu
description: I've found Smoobu to be an extremely effective tool for streamlining the management of my vacation rental properties. The platform significantly simplifies daily operations, resulting in noticeable time savings. The customer support has been consistently excellent, with prompt and helpful responses. Furthermore, I value the company's commitment to ongoing platform enhancements. I confidently recommend Smoobu to fellow vacation rental owners.
author: Ja Keya A.
pros: I love everything for set up to auto management for bookings
cons: I dont have any cons for Smoobu, love it
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Review for the company
description: It was very easy to learn. I thought it was extremly user friendly …
author: Chris C.
pros: It’s well put together. Works extremly fast akway happy when using it good job j
cons: Nothing it’s great…
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: strongly recommended for professional hosts
author: Ana T.
pros: I've been using Smoobu for over 2 years now, and I've got to say, their customer service is top-notch. Talking to real people instead of bots is a nice touch. They're quick to respond and always helpful.The host solution is a game changer, making it so much easier to manage my property across multiple sites. It saves me from double bookings and lets me adjust rates and availability all at once. Plus, the automated messages and website creation are a big help.I really like the financial stats feature, it gives me a quick look at my earnings across different platforms. The dashboard's cool too.
cons: It'd be great if the financial stats could factor in the commissions from the different platforms. I know it's a big ask, given the different commission rates, but it would be a helpful addition. I would also have an ability to block individual apartments leaving the entire property open for bookings by groups.

review_title: Book with smoobu
description: Pretty satisfied few drawbacks but pretty satisfied
author: Amanda T.
pros: The ability to combine any booking from any location in the world
cons: When you book it doesn't give you the option to add anybody but an adult
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Awesome Software for Vacation Rental Management
description: We've owned our condo for just over a year. I found Smoobu when I was initially looking for a software tool to help me get up and running renting through Airbnb and VRBO. From the first day through today, they have been super supportive and helpful. The product integrates nicely with those travel sites (and others) to keep things organized (i.e. no double bookings), helps tremendously with communications and provides a great customer experience with all our guests. I would highly recommend Smoobu!
author: Jim T.
pros: Once it's set up, it is absolutely indispensable and critical to organize and coordinate a vacation rental.
cons: Nothing really... All questions are answered quickly and they continue to add additional features.

review_title: This product is geared towards Europeans
description: I have had a terrible experience with Smoobu and do not recommend this product to anyone
author: Heidi F.
pros: The guest app was a nice feature. This product was less expensive than others
cons: The customer service for this product is terrible. It is difficult to speak to anyone by phone and if you are able to finally get through it has to be during European hours so if you can't talk first thing in the morning you are out of luck. Many features on the included booking website are geared towards Europeans and cannot be fixed. For example, Sq meters instead of sq ft, the format for the date is day/month/year, the website has the word domicile as a tab which should say home but they have yet to fix, I never could get the website to work properly for direct bookings (whenever I tried certain dates it said that those dates weren't open even though they were). I also could not get PayPal to work with the booking website and when I asked customer service for help with they asked me to send them a screenshot of the problem (that's usually what they wanted for everything). Lastly, the most frustrating thing about this program is that after the free trial I decided to pay for a year upfront and now that I have discovered how much I don't like the program and want to cancel they won't give me a prorated refund.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Vero excellent
author: Gianluca M.
pros: Work good and very simple to use… mobile versione And excellent integrations with ota and partner software
cons: Easy use and good integrations with other apps..

review_title: Good software. It is possible to make it excellent software
description: Overall convenient and friendly software. In my opinion with some other functions like the ones I mentioned it can turn from good software into excellent software. It is important for me to add that there are similar software to this one at lower prices and at more expensive prices. In my country the average monthly software cost ranges around 50 euros. If you were able to connect a credit company that works with Israel and flexibility along with invoice automation, I have no doubt that I would recommend many to switch to this software.
author: tamir E.
pros: The interface is convenient from any computer and mobile phone
cons: 1.There is no clear place to see a customer payment status. 2. In my country the software cannot connect to a credit card so I need to use more software. 3. If I want to issue a concentrated invoice at the end of a month to a supplier that sends customers to me it is problematic. That is, it is not possible to open a clean invoice and associate it with customers that I had this month.

review_title: Software for Rental Owners
author: Martin K.
pros: Smoobu makes landlord life easier! Great solutions, very good support. I wouldn't want to rent without Smoobu anymore. I didn't dare to use the web building kit at first, but now I have my own website from Smoobu's building kit. Since I'm an IT layman, that's saying something. Smoobu is absolutely worth the price, also for the standardized communication, and the pricing tools. All in all - 1A.Translated with [sensitive content hidden] (free version)
cons: I would like to have easier options for adding sitemap and favicon, but I'm sure Smoobu will help me with that competently.

review_title: Extremely helpful and intuitive
description: Amazing.
author: Luana H.
pros: I started using Smoobu back when it was really small and sort of beta version and liked it from the getgo. In the meantime they have improved and expanded so much and i am truly happy for them because what they offer is a high quality product. The platform is easy to use,intuitive and responsive,easily accessible on all devices. The customer service is fast and helpful. Already converted many of my colleagues into clients and would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a tool that helps organise your hospitality small business.
cons: The color palette for the website,perhaps.

review_title: Comprehensive Channel Manager
description: I have been using Smoobu for over 8 months now and our entire family is very happy to be able to use it. We all use it pretty much daily to mainly accept reservations and coordinate check-ins and check-outs.
author: Kim K.
pros: Using Smoobu was an absolute game changer for us. Being able to adjust prices and reservations once and apply them automatically to all the different platforms on which our properties are listed saves as a huge amount of work plus it provides a great overview of the reservations of all properties in one place.
cons: Connecting the calendar with some specific portals was a bit difficult, which mainly has to do with the technical expertise of the portals though. The payment system integrated in our website works great. It would be helpful to be able to include different bank accounts for different properties though.

review_title: You can phone them! You call them, they answer. They listen, they do what you want. In minutes!
description: It supports my business, and saves me time and money. It also frees me up to grow my business and add new channels with confidence
author: Gerry N.
pros: Easy to use, intuitive. Great dashboard with everything you need all in one screen. All backed up by the best customer service I have had with a Channel Manager. It's like having a back office that actually likes working with you. Before discovering Smoobu I had tried 2 other channel managers. I lasted 9 months with the first and only 3 months with the second. They were difficult to navigate, badly designed. The customer service was awful, you had to either send an email and wait for a reply or make an appointment sometime in the future to get a call back (that often just didn't happen). I was going crazy and about to give up on finding something that worked. Then I found Smoobu. It was a Saturday afternoon, and they had a telephone number. Just out of curiosity I called (expecting a voicemail saying they were closed). Much to my surprise a human being answered. I was up and running within hours. A connection that with a previous company had taken 3 weeks took them 2 minutes. Yes I know, unbelievable. No more stress. No more feelings of isolation. No more double bookings (and being told it was somehow my fault). I am now relaxed and happy and growing my business. And concentrating on my guests. I really feel like I have found a business partner who cares about me and is part of my success.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very good channel management tool
author: Christian K.
pros: This is an excellent Channel Manager. My guests at Villa Hygge in Ciovo Croatia love the personalised web sites where I can provide in greatest detail all the information required that a guest might be looking for, such as places to to eat, shop, attractions, beaches, activities, etc, etc. Also the integration with the main booking platforms works seamlessly. I can highly recommend Smoobu to anyone looking for trouble-free booking management.
cons: It is a bit costly, but the benefits may weigh in favourably.

review_title: Smoobu just works
description: The most important consideration for me was to be able to sync instantly across multiple booking channels, including my own website. Now that I can do this it means I can have instant booking switched on without the stress of worrying about double bookings. Smoobu just works great
author: Petra B.
pros: I really love using Smoobu in my business, it is so easy to use across platforms, and it allows me to run my business the way I envisaged it when I started, by being responsive to the needs of my guests. It helps me to be professional and to stay on top of everything. It also helps me to sleep at night
cons: There is nothing that I dislike about the software, I recommend that anybody in the room rental, holiday letting or hotel business gives it a try

review_title: Excellent resource for syncing calendars and interfacing with website
description: My overall experience with Smoobu was excellent.
author: Krista K.
pros: The feature that was most impactful is the ability to sync calendars from Airnbn, VRBO onto one calendar that was used to interface on my personal website for my short term rental property. Very good value for the functionality and service provided. Excellent customer service. All questions were answered in timely, clear and helpful manner.
cons: There were a couple of times when I needed to contact Smoobu as canceled reservations on Airbnb do not automatically clear on the Smoobu system. Once I realized it was necessary to double check my main calendar after a guest canceled, it wasn't a problem.

review_title: Easy to use and extraordinary assistance
description: Managing prices and availability is very easy, even from the smartphone. The software allows you also to make most changes to your properties by yourself. Messaging with guest from one place makes you save a lot of time: no need to log in and out all day. Automatic mails do the job for you.
author: massimo C.
pros: This is very easy to use and that makes you very efficient. Their assistance service really makes the difference. You are never alone!
cons: Maybe I'd like to be updated when they release new features, and to make it really complete, they need to develop the invoicing system (more like a PMS)
